title: SignResult
description: Result of `rebar sign <ticket_id> <manifest_json> --output json` (and the library sign_manifest() / MCP sign_manifest): the persisted SIGNATURE record plus the resolved ticket_id. manifest is the array of verified-step strings; signed_at is a ns-epoch integer. Expand phase (story 8d8e) admits BOTH shapes: the legacy HMAC record (algorithm HMAC-SHA256, `signature` hex, `key_id` fingerprint, `head_sha`) and the new op-cert record (algorithm `sshsig`, an `envelope` DSSE string, `principal`, `material_fingerprint`, `merged_log_commit`). A validation/resolve failure emits no JSON (stderr + nonzero exit).

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex (legacy HMAC record only; null/absent on an op-cert record).

key_id.description: Environment key fingerprint (legacy HMAC record only).

head_sha.description: Audit metadata: HEAD at signing time.

envelope.description: Encoded rebar.opcert.v1 DSSE envelope (op-cert record only; null/absent on a legacy HMAC record).

principal.description: The DSSE principal (environment id) the op-cert was signed under (op-cert record only).

material_fingerprint.description: The material fingerprint bound into the op-cert subject (op-cert record only).

merged_log_commit.description: The bound commit (verified-at sha, else HEAD) the op-cert subject binds (op-cert record only).
